name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve

labels: ''

---

## Summary

Describe the bug. Provide a clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.


## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happens. Provide any error messages or stack traces if applicable.

## Root Cause [Optional]

A clear and concise description of the root cause of the issue.

## Suggested Fix [Optional]

A clear and concise description of the suggested fix for the issue.

## Workaround [Optional]

A clear and concise description of any temporary workaround for the issue.

## Related Issues [Optional]

List any related issues that are already open or closed.
